zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fulwood於大約1415年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，他的父親John de Fulwood21歲，母親Isabel Harewell22歲。他於1445年與Lady Anne Neville在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福結婚。他去世於1475年在英國斯塔福爾塔沃斯享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fulwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Fullwood
meanings: English (Midlands): habitational name from a lost place called Fulwood near Clay Hall in Tanworth in Arden, Warwickshire or from one or more of the other places so called, such as Fulwood in Ecclesall (Yorkshire), Fulwood (Lancashire), Fulwood in Sutton in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), and Fullwood Farm in Hulland (Derbyshire). From Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + wudu ‘wood’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fulwood was born about 1415, in Warwickshire, England, his father, John de Fulwood, was 21 and his mother, Isabel Harewell, was 22. He married Lady Anne Neville in 1445, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England. He died in 1475, in Tamworth, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fulwood est né environ 1415, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Fulwood, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harewell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Neville en 1445, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1475, à Tamworth, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fulwoodが約1415年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Fulwoodは21歳，母Isabel Harewellは22歳であった。1445年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードでLady Anne Nevilleと結婚した。彼は1475年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアタムウオルスで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fulwood(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Fulwood(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Harewell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 Lady Anne Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1475년 영국 스태퍼드실르 타워스에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fulwood родился около 1415 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Fulwood было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harewell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Neville в 1445 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия. Он умер в 1475 г. в местности тамворт, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.
